title: angelica maximowiczii var. australis
intro: Angelica maximowiczii var. australis, also known as the Yunnan angelica or Chinese angelica, is a variety of the Angelica maximowiczii plant, a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). The root of the Angelica maximowiczii var. australis plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Angelica maximowiczii var. australis include dried roots, which are often decocted in water or used in teas, and the plant's essential oil, which is extracted through steam distillation.
